name: cpu-flamegraph
description: Capture and analyze CPU flamegraphs over SSH. Pure local ssh CLI + Perl flamegraph.pl — harness-agnostic, works in stock Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Capture & analyze CPU flamegraphs over SSH
interface.longDescription: Run `perf record` on a remote host via SSH, parse perf script locally, render SVG via flamegraph.pl, and emit Top-N hotspot functions. Pure Bash + Perl + JS; no native deps. SSH key auth or password (sshpass) supported.
defaultPrompt: Capture a CPU flamegraph for the mongod process on host 10.0.0.1
